content: Overlay-label popup hardening slice completed: user observed that label selection worked but the click popup still did not appear. Root cause was not only competing click listeners; pan/zoom could start pointer capture from the same popup label target, especially in Safari/SVG target paths, causing the final click to be treated as canvas interaction. Popup triggers are now excluded from pan starts, and popup trigger lookup walks from SVG/Text child targets to the nearest .archmap-popup-trigger without depending only on Element.closest(). Existing capture-phase popup activation and SVG group child-bounds anchor fallback remain in place. Updated docs/aof/OVERLAY-POPUP-QIF-CHECK-2026-07-11.md. Verification: npm test -- --run test/interaction.test.ts (10 passing); npx tsc --noEmit; npm test (234 passing); npm run build; Playwright real-browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:5173/ confirmed the incident-response 1 warning label opens .archmap-label-popup and outside click closes it. Existing untracked reports/ remains untouched.
